---
title: "The Rt. Rev. Francis Thomas McDougall"
---

## The Rt. Rev. Francis Thomas McDougall

**Dates:** (1817–1886)

### Description

Bishop of Labuan and Sarawak

### Biography

He married Harriette Bunyon in 1843. He returned to England in the late 1860s and eventually became a Canon of Winchester Cathedral.

### Letters

- Letter from June 25th 1885

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
